overall.description: First-person exploration through a dense cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from claustrophobic indoor storage spaces to vibrant neon-lit streets and elevated industrial walkways. The high-quality game engine footage showcases futuristic architecture with dense holographic advertisements and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit storage room with corrugated metal walls, cardboard boxes, and trash bags. The camera moves forward through a narrow corridor into a semi-covered patio area featuring a red sofa and folding table, approaching an exit to the outside.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered patio, the scene opens into a vast cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera walks through a street market with food stalls under white umbrellas, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as the camera navigates between vendor stalls.

orange rusted metal railings along the staircase

metal scaffolding structures supporting the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the street level and begins ascending a metal staircase with rusted railings. The perspective shifts upward, revealing a rusty water tank and industrial scaffolding. Upon reaching the top, the scene transitions to an elevated metal catwalk with grate flooring, offering a higher vantage point of the neon cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with neon signage and industrial structures

passing under large purple neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated metal catwalk, the camera traverses between industrial rooftop structures. A large purple neon sign with Japanese characters dominates the view ahead. The path passes air conditioning units and metal shacks, with the sprawling neon cityscape visible in the background. A person walks in the opposite direction along the narrow walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairway into dark corridor with green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the elevated catwalk down metal stairs, leaving the open rooftop behind. It enters a narrow, enclosed corridor dominated by green neon lighting. The space features corrugated metal walls, storage shelves, and illuminated vending machines, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere distinct from the open city views above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic storage area into a sprawling neon cityscape before descending back into a narrow industrial corridor. It begins in a dimly lit room with corrugated metal walls and cardboard boxes, moving through a narrow corridor and a semi-covered patio toward the outside. As the camera emerges, the scene opens into a vast cyberpunk street market where wet asphalt reflects the glow of towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements. The perspective then shifts upward as the camera ascends a rusted metal staircase to an elevated catwalk, traversing industrial rooftop structures and passing a large purple neon sign while overlooking the city. Finally, the camera descends from the heights and enters a tight, enclosed corridor dominated by green neon lighting and vending machines, returning to a sense of confinement.
